official_sources.evidence: Official API material and changelog include derivatives public/private surfaces, funding-rate endpoints and derivatives trade-history references.

runtime_isolation: Keep Bitstamp spot REST/WS runtime isolated from derivatives symbols, account state, positions and risk until a derivatives profile is implemented.
unsupported_runtime_reason: Official derivatives/contracts surfaces exist, but the current adapter only wires Spot symbols, Spot market data and Spot private lifecycle semantics.
unsafe_to_promote_without: signed derivatives order lifecycle request specs
remaining_work: pin derivatives market metadata endpoint specs
add signed derivatives order lifecycle request specs and dry-run guard
